formulas.label: eq0056

formulas.latex: \begin{matrix} & & min F^{2 n d} = \eta_{1} \frac{F_{1}^{2 n d} - F_{1 , min}^{2 n d}}{F_{1 , max}^{2 n d} - F_{1 , min}^{2 n d}} + \eta_{2} \frac{F_{2}^{2 n d} - F_{2 , min}^{2 n d}}{F_{2 , max}^{2 n d} - F_{2 , min}^{2 n d}} \\ & & s . t . \begin{cases} \text{Constraints} \text{of} \text{timetabling} \left(1\right) - \left(9\right) , \left(41\right) - \left(43\right) , \\ \text{Constraints} \text{of} \text{rolling} \text{stock} \text{utilization} \text{plan} \left(13\right) - \left(21\right) , \left(46\right) - \left(49\right) , \left(52\right) , \left(53\right) , \\ \text{Constraints} \text{of} \text{train} \text{formation} \text{plan} \left(24\right) - \left(26\right) , \\ \text{Constraints} \text{of} \text{passenger} \text{flow} \text{strategy} \left(27\right) - \left(31\right) , \left(34\right) - \left(36\right) , \left(44\right) , \left(45\right) , \left(55\right) \\ p_{i , l , f} = \left(\hat{p}\right)_{i , l , f} , \forall i \in I_{u} , l \in L , d \in D , f \in G , \\ T D_{1 , 1 , f} = \left(\hat{T D}\right)_{1 , 1 , f} , T D_{1 , z , f} = \left(\hat{T D}\right)_{1 , z , f} , \forall f \in G . \\ T D_{n , 1 , f} = \left(\hat{T D}\right)_{n , 1 , f} , T D_{n , z , f} = \left(\hat{T D}\right)_{n , z , f} , \forall f \in G . \end{cases}\end{matrix}
